subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament! The yearning of 'Abdu'l-Bahá to behold thy countenance is exceeding great, but obstacles [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد و راسخ میثاق اشتیاق عبدالبهاء بمشاهده روی تو بسیار است ولی موانع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
